result:
Done. Here's what Round 10 adds:

**Time-Travel Replay** — a 256-frame history ring buffer (~40MB heap-allocated) that automatically records every generation. New controls:

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `<` / `,` | Rewind through history (enters replay mode) |
| `>` / `.` | Fast-forward through history |
| `s` | Step forward one frame in replay |
| `SPACE` | Resume live simulation from current point (branch) |
| `t` | Toggle timeline bar |

The status bar shows `⏪ REPLAY` when rewinding, and a timeline scrubber bar with a `●` playhead showing your position in the recorded history. Pressing SPACE at any point in history branches — it restores that state, truncates the future, and resumes live simulation from there.

This is a force multiplier on all 9 prior rounds: you can now watch emitter/absorber flow patterns develop, rewind to the critical moment, change the ruleset, and compare outcomes.
